hero.title: Resume
hero.subtitle: 13+ years building backend platforms, commerce systems, and AI-assisted engineering workflows

professionalSummary.description: Senior Software Engineer with 13+ years of experience building backend platforms, distributed commerce systems, and production workflows for small, fast-moving teams. Strong track record across live commerce, auctions, payments, shipping, real-time video, search, event-driven services, and AWS infrastructure. Currently building complex backend systems at Tilt while using modern AI tooling and carefully scoped credentials to make delivery faster without weakening production safety. Known for independent ownership, clear communication, reliable delivery, and turning ambiguous product problems into shipped systems.

experience.title: Senior Backend Engineer
achievements: Build and operate backend systems for Tilt's live commerce platform across livestreaming, auctions, product inventory, payments, shipping, seller tooling, and real-time buyer workflows.
Ship changes inside a large TypeScript backend monorepo with 50+ services and shared libraries, spanning NestJS, Express, Hasura, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS ECS/Lambda, SNS/SQS, S3, and AppConfig.

Delivered complex commerce integrations and operational fixes across Stripe, Shippo, Royal Mail, InPost, Hasura schema exposure, auction events, live rooms, product ingestion, and mobile seller workflows.

Used modern AI tooling and connected operational context across Linear, Slack, Sentry, Stripe, Shippo, and AWS workflows to accelerate implementation, debugging, and release work while keeping credentials scoped and production actions explicit.

Introduced and improved AI-assisted engineering workflows, including repo-specific agent guidance, ticket-to-implementation experiments, CI feedback loops, and safer handoff patterns for a fast-moving distributed team.
Recognized internally as a reliable engineer who moves quickly, collaborates well across product and engineering, and handles ambiguous backend problems with strong ownership.

experience.title: Senior Backend Engineer
achievements: Architected backend services for an in-game advertising and gaming assets platform used by mobile game integrations.
Scaled ad engagement and targeting systems to handle 1.7B+ monthly impressions at peak traffic with real-time reporting needs.
Led integrations for Unity and Unreal Engine SDKs, translating partner requirements into reliable backend APIs and data flows.
Built AWS CDK infrastructure, GraphQL APIs, background processing, and operational tooling for a small startup engineering team.
Mentored developers, improved delivery practices, and consolidated legacy repositories into a more maintainable monorepo.

experience.title: Software Engineer (Consulting)
achievements: Built backend and infrastructure for a crypto discovery product, covering real-time market data ingestion, ranking, and Telegram mini-app support.
Optimized database access for price scraping from 20+ exchanges with indexing, caching, and query improvements.
Implemented voting and community mechanisms while keeping non-technical stakeholders aligned on trade-offs and delivery scope.
Integrated a mobile backend for Telegram mini-app workflows used by a high-traffic consumer audience.

experience.title: Software Engineer
achievements: Develop clinical trials management system for German healthcare company Clariness
Implement scalable backend architecture using AWS, Terraform, Docker, and GitLab CI/CD pipelines
Integrate Twilio API for direct call agent functionality and resolve critical timezone calculation bugs
Simplify HIPAA compliance requirements for healthcare team, ensuring successful regulatory approval
Optimize database performance for handling thousands of concurrent patient record queries

experience.title: Backend Engineer
achievements: Contribute to Telemetry API and OTA updates system for world's fastest electric hypercar
Implement microservices architecture using TypeScript, GraphQL, and event-driven design with Kafka
Design scalability solutions handling real-time telemetry data from 100+ vehicle sensors
Conduct 15+ technical interviews and establish hiring standards for the team
Create secure OTA updates system with rollback capabilities, ensuring zero failed deployments

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
achievements: Lead development standards meetings with C-level executives, establishing company-wide coding practices
Architect scalable web applications for Norwegian media company handling 1M+ monthly users
Implement legacy system integration connecting 4 real estate agency APIs into unified platform
Mentor 3 junior developers achieving promotion to mid-level positions within 12 months
Reduce system downtime by 80% through performance optimization and proactive monitoring

experience.title: Software Engineer
achievements: Develop internal tools: Nodebook (Symfony), Atlas (data analysis), AAT (testing)
Improve performance by migrating from Groovy & Grails to Node.js
Create framework-agnostic schema language for testing tools and present to SoftBank executives

experience.title: Student Software Developer
achievements: Tracked 3000+ hours on various projects while attending university
Worked with Joomla, WordPress, Magento, custom PHP + jQuery
Managed ad campaigns, SEO optimization, and server maintenance
Balanced work and studies, graduating with multiple job offers

personalProjects.name: Memoato
personalProjects.description: AI-powered personal memory and life tracking platform with natural-language capture, automated categorization, searchable history, and insight dashboards.

personalProjects.name: PLAYGRND
personalProjects.description: Amateur football league and tournament platform with player profiles, standings, match results, and community-first local sports workflows.

personalProjects.name: PLAYGRND Draft
personalProjects.description: Fast football draft game where users spin iconic national-team tournament squads, build a World XI, simulate a tournament, and share the result.

personalProjects.name: Personal Website
personalProjects.description: Personal publishing and project hub with blog posts, lightweight traffic stats, Memoato profile integration, public project notes, and self-hosted Fresh/Deno delivery.

personalProjects.name: HILLS Lab
personalProjects.description: Independent engineering studio for backend systems, applied AI workflows, infrastructure experiments, and small product bets.

_disabledPersonalProjects.name: Trustworthy Agent Memory
_disabledPersonalProjects.description: Research notebook on reliable context systems for AI-assisted software teams, focused on provenance, freshness, permissions, contradiction handling, memory policy, and evals.
_disabledPersonalProjects.note: Temporarily hidden from the public CV, regular PDF, ATS PDF, and tailored NLC materials. Bring this back when there is a more tangible shipped artifact or evidence to point to.

references.title: Senior Software Engineering Manager, Head of UDM Operations at Ericsson Nikola Tesla; currently board member at Abysalto
references.quote: Hrvoje stood out early in his career because he was always eager to learn, challenge the status quo, and take on responsibilities beyond his role. His curiosity, initiative, and drive to improve things made it clear that he had the potential to grow into a strong engineering leader.

references.title: Co-founder of Profico
references.quote: During his time at Profico, Hrvoje proved to be someone we could truly rely on. He was not afraid to take responsibility, step outside his comfort zone, and push new initiatives that helped move things forward.

references.title: Engineering Manager at Rimac then; now Director of Software Engineering at Toming
references.quote: I had the pleasure of working with Hrvoje at Rimac, where he served as a Senior Backend Engineer within the department I was leading, building telemetry & over-the-air update systems for hypercars. He's an exceptionally capable engineer who consistently delivered outstanding results in a technically highly challenging domain. His code was built to last, much of it kept running reliably long after he moved on. Reliable as a colleague and a genuine pleasure to work with.

references.title: Head of Freelance at Povio
references.quote: Hrvoje is a pleasure to work with, open, professional, and transparent in his communication, and someone who reliably delivered on every agreed scope.

references.title: CTO at ReneVerse; currently Software Architect at Incode
references.quote: Hrvoje is a top-tier software engineer who makes a next-level impact. At ReneVerse, he was key to developing our core Web2 and Web3 services, most notably architecting a sophisticated ad engagement data system on AWS that powered our real-time targeting. His mastery of serverless, GraphQL, and blockchain integration is matched by his excellent problem-solving and communication skills. He is also a proactive collaborator and a natural mentor who elevates the entire team. Any team would be lucky to have him.

references.title: CEO at Tilt
references.quote: I have been personally messaged various times about the quality and speed of Hrvoje's work across several projects. Everyone is happy having him onboard.
